text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Partway through the summer camp, I<n>learn that the
younger racer I've<n>been so enamored with won't
get to<n>run in the autumn Tenno Sho—just<n>because
there aren't enough slots.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
It feels like it's my fault—like I'm<n>getting in the
way of my oshis. I'm<n>feeling like I should never
have<n>debuted at all, when my trainer<n>reminds
me...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
The pain Umamusume feel today<n>becomes their
strength tomorrow.<n>They can overcome any
difficulty!<n>And that's why I love them so much!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I know the younger racer will get over<n>this. That's
why I can't let it bring me<n>down!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I'll race with all my strength for her.<n>I'll take all the
passion of every<n>Umamusume I've ever raced
against<n>and use it to confront Opera O and<n>Doto!
